Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re, html content = sys.stdin.read\(\) titles = re.findall\(r'<title><!\\[CDATA\\[\(.*?\)\\]\\]></title>', content\) if not titles: titles = re.findall\(r'<title>\(.*?\)</title>', content\) links = re.findall\(r'<link>\(.*?\)</link>', content\) for i, \(t, l\) in enumerate\(zip\(titles[1:], links[1:]\)\): if i >= 5: break t = html.unescape\(t.strip\(\)\) print\(f'{i+1}. [{t}]\({l.strip\(\)}\)'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json try: data = json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\) for i, item in enumerate\(data[:5]\): title = item['title']['rendered'] link = item['link'] print\(f'{i+1}. [{title}]\({link}\)'\) except: pass ")
